description: Calendar year in which the reported activities occurred. Source: TRI_REPORTING_FORM.REPORTING_YEAR
Unique TRI facility identification number. Identifies a specific geographic location; does NOT change with ownership.
EPA Facility Registry Service unique ID. Enables cross-program data linkage.
Name of the reporting facility.
Street address of the reporting facility.
City of the reporting facility.
County of the reporting facility.
Two-letter state code (always IL for this dataset).
ZIP code of the reporting facility.
Bureau of Indian Affairs code. 100% empty in Illinois non-tribal data — retained for schema compliance.
Tribe name on whose land the facility is located. 100% empty in Illinois non-tribal data.
Facility latitude from EPA Facility Registry System. Note: EPA stopped collecting directly in RY 2005; now sourced from FRS.
Facility longitude from EPA Facility Registry System.
Horizontal datum for lat/lon. Empty for most IL records after RY 2005 transition to FRS coordinates.
Name of parent company controlling the reporting facility.

EPA-standardised current ultimate U.S. parent company name.

Primary 4-digit SIC code. Reported 1987–2005 only. Empty for 2010–2024 data.

Chemical classification: TRI (general EPCRA 313), PBT (persistent bioaccumulative toxic), or DIOXIN.
YES if the chemical is a metal with TRI reporting restrictions.
Metal category 1–4 per EPA classification. Determines how transfers are treated (disposal vs. treatment).
YES if chemical is classified as a carcinogen by OSHA.
YES if chemical is a persistent, bioaccumulative, and toxic (PBT) substance.
YES if chemical is a per- and polyfluoroalkyl substance. PFAS first added to TRI in RY 2020.
R = Full Form R (detailed quantities required). A = Form A Certification (no quantities — all release fields are zero by design).
Pounds for all chemicals except dioxin/dioxin-like compounds, which are reported in grams.
Estimated fugitive (non-stack) air emissions in pounds.
Estimated stack (point source) air emissions in pounds.

Indicates whether Section 8.9 value is a production ratio or an activity index.
Ratio of current-year production to prior-year production. Used to contextualise release changes.
Curation flag: TRUE if TOTAL_RELEASES is null/missing. In this dataset: 0 records (strong completeness).
Curation flag: TRUE if TOTAL_RELEASES == 0. Does NOT imply absence of chemical activity — see ZERO VALUE SEMANTICS in README.
Curation flag: TRUE if FORM TYPE == 'A'. All release quantities for Form A records are zero by regulatory design.
Curation flag: TRUE if year-over-year % change in TOTAL_RELEASES > 100% for a given facility-chemical pair. May reflect genuine events, reporting corrections, or facility changes.
Derived: sum of 5.1 (fugitive air) and 5.2 (stack air) releases. Convenience field for air-pathway analysis.
Derived: alias of 5.3 - WATER. Added for naming consistency with AIR_RELEASE_TOTAL.
Derived (FACILITY_TIME_SERIES): count of distinct chemical reports submitted by this facility in this year.
Derived (INDUSTRY/YEAR_STATS): count of distinct TRIFID values in this group.
Derived (INDUSTRY/YEAR_STATS): count of distinct chemical names in this group.
Derived (INDUSTRY_TIME_SERIES): total chemical report rows for this sector-year.
Derived (CHEMICAL_SUMMARY): rank by TOTAL_RELEASES descending.
Derived (CHEMICAL_SUMMARY): number of distinct facilities that reported this chemical.
Derived (CHEMICAL_SUMMARY): number of distinct years this chemical appeared in the dataset.
Derived (CHEMICAL_YEAR_TIME_SERIES): count of distinct facilities reporting this chemical in this year.
Derived (CHEMICAL_YEAR_TIME_SERIES): TOTAL_RELEASES / PRODUCTION WSTE (8.1-8.7). Only valid where production waste > 0; NaN otherwise.
Derived (YEAR_STATS): total facility-chemical records in this reporting year.
Derived (YEAR_STATS): sum of TOTAL_RELEASES across all records in this year (pounds).
Derived (YEAR_STATS): mean TOTAL_RELEASES per record in this year.
Derived (YEAR_STATS): median TOTAL_RELEASES per record in this year.
Derived (YEAR_STATS): count of Form A submissions in this year.
Derived (YEAR_STATS): count of records with TOTAL_RELEASES == 0 in this year.
